Manufacturing Comparison

Pakistan vs China Clothing Manufacturing: Which Is Better for Your Brand in 2026?

✎ FABRIOZA Team 📅 July 1, 2026 ☕ 14 min read
Home / Blog / Pakistan vs China Clothing Manufacturing: Which Is Better for Your Brand in 2026?

China has dominated manufacturing conversations for decades. But for custom clothing brands ordering 50-500 units, the math has shifted. Pakistan — specifically the Sialkot manufacturing cluster — now offers advantages that China cannot match at small-to-medium order volumes.

This comparison is honest. China remains superior for some applications. But for the specific needs of startup and growing clothing brands, Pakistan wins on the metrics that matter most.

The Short Answer — It Depends Entirely on Your Order Size

If you're ordering 1,000+ units of established designs and have experience with international importing, China offers scale advantages. If you're ordering 50-500 units, need low minimums, want certified quality, and prefer DDP shipping handled for you, Pakistan is the better choice.

MOQ — The Most Important Factor for New Brands

Minimum order quantity is where the difference is most dramatic:

FactorPakistan (Sialkot)China
Min MOQ (certified factory)50 units300-1,000 units
Fabric lead time3-7 days (local)10-21 days
ISO 9001 at 50 unit MOQCommonRare
BSCI at 50 unit MOQHigh densityVariable

China's higher MOQs exist because Chinese factories typically import fabric from distant provinces in 300-500 meter minimum rolls. Pakistani factories source fabric from mills within 50km, enabling smaller purchases without surplus charges.

Total Landed Cost — The Real Comparison

FOB price is misleading. True landed cost includes manufacturing, shipping, duties, and brokerage fees.

Example — 100 custom hoodies to the USA:

  • China FOB: $12/unit × 100 = $1,200 + shipping ($350) + duty (12%, $144) + brokerage ($100) = $1,794 total
  • Pakistan DDP (FABRIOZA): $14/unit × 100 = $1,400 all-inclusive = $1,400 total

Pakistan is 22% cheaper on true landed cost at this volume. The DDP option eliminates surprise fees and complexity.

Certifications Compared

CertificationPakistan (Sialkot)China
ISO 9001Widely availableAvailable (larger factories)
BSCIHigh density in clusterVariable
SEDEXGrowing adoptionEstablished
OEKO-TEXAvailableAvailable

Product Specialization

  • Pakistan excels at: Heavyweight knitwear (hoodies, tracksuits), sportswear, performance activewear, custom team uniforms
  • China excels at: Woven basics, denim, fast fashion, high-volume standard products

For custom hoodies, streetwear, gym wear, and sportswear — the categories most startup brands need — Pakistan's specialization directly matches your requirements.

Shipping and Logistics

China FOB means you arrange your own shipping — complex for first-time importers. Pakistan DDP means FABRIOZA handles everything from factory to your door.

StepPakistanChina
Quote response24 hours24-48 hours
Sample production7-10 days10-20 days
Bulk production3-5 weeks4-8 weeks
Sea freight to USA25-35 days25-40 days

The Verdict

Choose Pakistan if: You order 50-500 units, manufacture knitwear/sportswear, are a first-time importer, need DDP shipping, and require certified quality.

Choose China if: You order 1,000+ units, need complex woven garments, and have established import infrastructure.

For Brands Ordering 50-500 Units, Request a Quote From FABRIOZA

Compare our pricing, quality, and service. ISO 9001 certified. DDP shipping. Free quote in 24 hours.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is Pakistan clothing quality as good as China?

At ISO 9001 certified factories like FABRIOZA, yes. The certification ensures the same quality standards apply regardless of location. Pakistan's Sialkot cluster specializes in knitwear and sportswear — categories where quality often exceeds Chinese production at comparable price points.

Which is cheaper — manufacturing in Pakistan or China?

At 50-500 unit volumes, Pakistan is typically 10-20% cheaper on true landed cost due to DDP shipping options and lower fabric costs. At 1,000+ units, China may offer lower per-unit pricing.

How do I verify a Pakistani clothing manufacturer is legitimate?

Request their ISO 9001 certificate number and verify it on the issuing body's website. Ask for a video factory tour, check their address on Google Maps, and request client references.

Does Pakistan have the same fabric range as China?

For knitwear, sportswear, and activewear fabrics: yes. For specialized woven fabrics and denim: China's range is broader.

Can I get DDP shipping from Pakistan?

Yes, FABRIOZA offers DDP (Delivered Duty Paid) shipping to USA, UK, Canada, Australia, and most of Europe.
